info.title: Flamingo Pay API
info.description: Payment processing and merchant management API for South African financial institutions

post.description: Authenticate as merchant, admin, or compliance officer. For merchants, provide merchantId and PIN. For admin/compliance, provide passcode and name.

post.summary: Merchant login by phone and PIN

post.description: Send an OTP code to a phone for 2FA, PIN reset, or signup. Then verify it with the code.
Reset PIN after OTP verification. Requires OTP code from previous verification step.

amount.description: Partial refund amount. If omitted, full refund issued.

post.summary: Refresh sanctions and PEP lists (owner/manager only)
Screen name or merchant against sanctions

post.description: Receives payment notifications from Ozow. Signature verification required.
Receives payment notifications from PayShap. HMAC-SHA256 signature verification required.
